message:
fix(engine): replace unreachable!() panics with recoverable error returns

Six modules used unreachable!() in match arms that could theoretically
be reached, causing process aborts instead of recoverable errors:

- baseline_interpreter: relational and bitwise operator arms return
  InterpreterError::TypeError
- stdlib: map and set dispatch return StdlibError::TypeError
- lowering_pipeline: logical assignment operators return
  LoweringPipelineError::InvariantViolation
- object_model: Proxy set returns ObjectError::TypeError
- execution_orchestrator: SagaType::Publish returns
  OrchestratorError::Saga
- lib.rs: DirectEngineInvocation route returns EvalError

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
